---
title: 'Spock | Live Long And Prosper'
date: '2015-02-24T01:10:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4057923797723377875'
blogger_filename: '/2015/02/spock-live-long-and-prosper.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Perspective'
---

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Leonard Nimoy (Spock) tells the Jewish Roots of the famous Vulcan Greeting</h3><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/DyiWkWcR86I" width="560"></iframe><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DyiWkWcR86I" target="_blank"></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DyiWkWcR86I" target="_blank">YouTube: Leonard Nimoy's Jewish Story</a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Shin</b> (also spelled <b>Å in</b> (<i><span class="Unicode" style="text-decoration: none; white-space: normal;" title="DIN 31635 Arabic">Å¡Ä«n</span></i>) or <b>Sheen</b>) literally means "teeth", "press", and "sharp"; It is the twenty-first letter in many <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Semitic_abjads" title="Semitic abjads">Semitic abjads</a>, including <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Phoenician_script" title="Phoenician script">Phoenician</a> <span class="script-phoenician" dir="rtl" style="direction: rtl; font-family: 'ALPHABETUM Unicode', 'MPH 2B Damase', Aegean, Code2001, FreeSans, sans-serif;" title="Phoenician alphabet"></span>, <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aramaic_script" title="Aramaic script">Aramaic</a>/<a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hebrew_script" title="Hebrew script">Hebrew</a> <span class="script-hebrew" dir="rtl" style="font-family: Alef, 'SBL Hebrew', David; font-size: 115%;">×©</span>, and <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Arabic_script" title="Arabic script">Arabic</a> <span class="script-arabic script-Arab" dir="rtl" style="font-family: Scheherazade,Lateef,Arial,'Arabic Transparent','Droid Arabic Naskh',Amiri,'Microsoft Sans Serif','Segoe UI','Sakkal Majalla','Microsoft Uighur','Arabic Typesetting',sans-serif,serif; font-size: 125%; font-weight: normal;">Ø´</span>â€Ž (in <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abjadi_order" title="Abjadi order">abjadi order</a>, 13th in modern order). Its sound value is a <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Voiceless_sibilant" title="Voiceless sibilant">voiceless sibilant</a>, <span class="IPA" title="Representation in the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA)">[<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Voiceless_palato-alveolar_sibilant" title="Voiceless palato-alveolar sibilant">Êƒ</a>]</span> or <span class="IPA" title="Representation in the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA)">[<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Voiceless_alveolar_fricative#Voiceless_alveolar_sibilant" title="Voiceless alveolar fricative">s</a>]</span>.<br /><h4><span class="mw-headline" id="In_Judaism">In Judaism</span></h4>Shin also stands for the word <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/El_Shaddai" title="El Shaddai">Shaddai</a>, a name for God. Because of this, a <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kohen" title="Kohen">kohen</a> (priest) forms the letter Shin with his hands as he recites the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Priestly_Blessing" title="Priestly Blessing">Priestly Blessing</a>. In the mid 1960s, actor <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leonard_Nimoy" title="Leonard Nimoy">Leonard Nimoy</a> used a single-handed version of this gesture to create the <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vulcan_Salute" title="Vulcan Salute">Vulcan hand salute</a> for his character, <a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mr._Spock" title="Mr. Spock">Mr. Spock</a>, on <i><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Star_Trek:_The_Original_Series" title="Star Trek: The Original Series">Star Trek</a></i>.<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-2"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shin_%28letter%29#cite_note-2">[2]</a></sup><br /><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DyiWkWcR86I" target="_blank">Live Long and Prosper: The Jewish Story Behind Spock, Leonard Nimoy's Star Trek Character </a></li></ul><br />First letter in the words: Shaddai, Shalom, Shechinah (Shekinah). <br /><br /><b>Shekinah</b>, <b>Shechinah</b>, <b>Shechina</b>, or <b>Schechinah</b> (<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hebrew_language" title="Hebrew language">Hebrew</a>: <span dir="rtl" lang="he">×©×›×™× ×”</span>â€Ž; <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Arabic_language" title="Arabic language">Arabic</a>: <span lang="ar">Ø§Ù„Ø³ÙƒÙŠÙ†Ø©</span>â€Ž), is the English transliteration of a <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hebrew_language" title="Hebrew language">Hebrew</a> noun meaning <i>dwelling</i> or <i>settling,</i> and denotes the dwelling or settling of the Divine Presence of God.</blockquote><br /><br /><br />So... I was watching the above links video. I was thinking to myself... Shaddai (the name of God). Shalom (Peace/Blessing: Nothing Missing Nothing Broken Everything Whole and Complete). Shechinah (The Holy Spirit, who IS The Presence of God).<br /><br />Every time the Vulcan greeting has been invoked, it was invoking a deeper truth. One that was built into our cores. The fact it was also used in a Jewish call to prayer/blessing gives it more depth and root. Vulcan, at it's essence, is a modern science fiction retelling of the Orthodox Jewish Story. Mankind, attempting to overcome his fallen nature, and rise above it. <br /><br />We, who are In Him, are full of The Presence that visited ancient Israel, and temporarily dwelt in the Temple. <br /><br />This truth is even more powerful and true for we who are full of the Shekinah Himself.<br /><br />I've always been fascinated with Vulcans, preferring them among the other alien species of the Star Trek series. I have a deeper sense of appreciation for them now.<br /><br />Live Long and Prosper my friends... or in other words: Shalom! <br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/shin-2-acee77c327e5.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/shin-2-acee77c327e5.jpeg" height="133" width="400" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spock-837c90a81284.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spock-837c90a81284.jpeg" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />In other words... will I #<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a>? <br /><br /><br />---<br /><h4>And now I leave you with a question:</h4><h4>&nbsp; </h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>So... what are your thoughts about this? What did this make you think about?&nbsp;</b></blockquote><br /><b>Hit me up on Twitter <a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe </a>or on Google <a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a></b><br /><h4> </h4><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-jesus.html" target="_blank">Got Jesus? </a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">About This Blog, and Darrell.&nbsp;</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Suggestions for other: Bloggers, Authors, Ministries, Thought Leaders, and More </a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box: suggestions for some of the tools I've used in my journey. </a></span></li></ul></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" height="232" width="320" /></a></div>
